text: {"claims":[{"statement":"UNILAG floated World Carnival to mark Golden Jubilee","claimType":"empirical","quote":"[\"When Unilag floated World Carnival to mark Golden Jubilee\"](http://www.vanguardngr.com/2012/11/when-unilag-floated-world-carnival-to-mark-golden-jubilee/).","entailment":"The quoted citation title explicitly states that UNILAG floated a World Carnival to commemorate its Golden Jubilee.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Prof. Ogunye said his happiest day was when his student became VC","claimType":"empirical","quote":"[\"My happiest day was when my student became VC – Prof. Ogunye\"](https://web.archive.org/web/20141011133326/http://dailyindependentnig.com/2013/02/my-happiest-day-was-when-my-student-became-vc-prof-ogunye/).","entailment":"The citation title records Prof. Ogunye’s statement that his happiest day occurred when his student became vice‑chancellor.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"UNILAG bid Odugbemi goodbye","claimType":"empirical","quote":"[\"Encomium as UNILAG bids Odugbemi bye\"](http://news2.onlinenigeria.com/news/general/21788-encomium-as-unilag-bids-odugbemi-bye.html).","entailment":"The cited article title indicates that UNILAG offered an encomium and said farewell to Odugbemi.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"A former UNILAG VC tasked leaders on selflessness","claimType":"empirical","quote":"[\"UNILAG ex-VC tasks leaders on selflessness -
